name: Granby Farmers Market

Products.value: Honey, meat, eggs, art, fresh produce, baked goods, and more (plus food trucks and live music)

Address.value: Polhamus Park, 99 W Jasper Ave, Granby, CO 80446

notes: On-file website http://www.granbychamber.com now redirects through a safebrowse.io warning page (dead/hijacked domain) — confirmed via curl (302 to safebrowse.io/warn.html). No usable market info found there. The market is branded 'Music & Market' and organized by Destination Granby (the town's official tourism organization) at Polhamus Park; treated this as the official source. Facebook/Instagram listed are Destination Granby's official accounts (VisitGranbyCO), which promote this event — no separate dedicated market social account was found. Months Open inferred from the published 2026 concert/market schedule on the page (Thursdays June 25 - Aug 13, 2026), not an explicit 'months open' statement. No mention of SNAP/EBT acceptance, ADA accessibility, or certified-organic status on the official page, so those fields were omitted. Third-party aggregators (nfmd.org, cropcartmarkets.com, colorado.com) had some overlapping info but were not used as sources per instructions.
